calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Apr-10-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Lynda Cole appearing for petitioner. The only issue is the fee request. Counsel explained the difficulties in resolving the other issues. Matter submitted.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Teena Paxton CSR# 1558. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: F. Smith.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of Inventory And Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-03-2007 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Mar-27-2007 Continued To Apr-10-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of Inventory And Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jan-31-2007 Continued To Apr-03-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of Inventory And Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jan-24-2007 Continued To Jan-31-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Paul Perdue appearing for respondent Jane Fanvu. Counsel apologized for not showing up on 1/10. He thought estate counsel was going to appear. Settlement was fully funded and funds was wire-transferred to the personal representative's account. Matter is continued to 1/31 for filing of inventory and petition for final distribution. Mr. Perdue agreed to notify estate counsel to appear.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of Inventory And Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jan-17-2007 Continued To Jan-24-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance made. Matter is continued to 1/24/07. Clerk to call Mr. Perdue to appear on 1/24.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of Inventory And Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jan-10-2007 Continued To Jan-17-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No parties, counsel, or interested persons appeared at the calendar call.

Upon review of the record, the Court continued the matter to January 17, 2007 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. Pursuant to the Court's prior rulings, the Court assessed interest against Ms. Fanvu on the principal amount of $100,000 at the rate of 10% per annum from the date of the May 2006 settlement agreement. Notice is to be sent to Paul Perdue, Counsel for Jane Fanvu, to that effect.

Judicial Officer: John Dearman, Judge; Court Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR# 11722 ; Bailiff: Deputy Mizota; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: Tim Kneis.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of Inventory And Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Nov-28-2006 Continued To Jan-10-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Perdue (Counsel for Jane Fanvu); Lynda Cole (Counsel for Kien Vu).

Mr. Perdue reported to the Court that Ms. Fanvu had secured a loan commitment and that escrow was now open. After further discussion, the Court ruled that if Ms. Fanvu does not pay $100,000.00 to the Estate on or before January 10, 2007, interest will accrue on the principal amount of $100,000 at the rate of 10% per annum from the date of the settlement. The matter was continued to January 10, 2007 at 9:00 a.m. for status of the payment.

Judicial Officer: John Dearman, Judge; Court Reporter: Mary Ellen Scherer CSR# 5802; Bailiff: Deputies Cruz and Mizota; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: Christine Nahnsen.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of Inventory And Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Nov-21-2006 Continued To Nov-28-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of Inventory And Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Nov-07-2006 Continued To Nov-21-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Perdue (Counsel for Jane Fanvu, surviving spouse); Lynda Cole (Counsel for Kieu-Hahn Vu, Administrator).

Mr. Perdue briefly reported on the status of Ms. Fanvu's (hopefully successful) attempts to refinance the real property, to which Ms. Cole objected, noting that the matter had been pending for some months. Nonetheless, the matter was continued to November 28, 2006 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judicial Officer: John Dearman, Judge; Court Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR# 11722; Bailiff: Deputy Mizota; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: Tim Kneis.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of Inventory And Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-10-2006 Continued To Nov-07-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

MINI MINUTES: Lynda Cole appearing for administrator. Mr. Perdue is not in court. Counsel received a call from Mr. Perdue and he said he is pushing his client to pay 100,000.00. MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-10-2006 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly for trial by court.

Appearances:
PAUL R. PERDUE, Esq. on behalf of Petitioner Jane Marie Fanvu
JOEL K. BELWAY, Esq. on behalf of Respondent Kieu-Hanh Thi Vu

The parties settled after being sent to Judge Pro Tem. The terms of the settlement were as follows: Petitioner to pay the Est. of Hien Duy Vu the sum of $100,000.00 with approval by the Probate Court. Peitioner needs 90 days for refinancing. Petitioner withdraw lis pendens. The $100,000.00 is to be distributed as follows: Expenses to probate are to be paid, and the remaining amount to be distributed to Mong Lan and the 9 children. Each side to bear own costs and fees. Motion regarding the dissolution of marriage is withdrawn.

Judge Pro Tem: Richard Warren; Clerks: Vera Mu/JIRoque; Reporter: Rita Howell #2542 (206)
